extension.name: simple-shiny-chat-with-mcp
extension.title: Python Shiny: AI Chat with MCP Tools
extension.description: A Python Shiny chat app that connects an LLM to tools over the Model Context Protocol (MCP), running on Connect. The tools run as the signed-in viewer, with their Connect permissions, not a shared key. Meant to be used with the FastAPI: MCP Server extension, but you can also point it at your own MCP server to build a chat over your own tools.
